solo.tokens_source: aider transcript reported 801 sent + 734 received on the single turn
solo.notes: Aider was invoked with TASK.md content as --message but no files were added to the chat. Aider asked for files and produced no edits.

pl.tokens_source: not directly captured; PL transcript shows only CI runner envelope while per-node aider token counts live in .aider.chat.history.md (multiple turns, not aggregated)
pl.notes: ci --runner aider drove the task.flow file end-to-end. Aider did edit src/app.js (PASS on Contact-absence test for that file), but introduced ES-module import syntax that broke the app-runs and imports-resolve tests. Most other source files were not reached.

tie_semantics: pl strictly dominates on verify_pass (3 > 2); solo is faster (-190s wall) but with strictly fewer passing tests. Margin is 1 test, which is small and within the range a k=3 rerun could invert.
